description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a striking orange and black livery, featuring detailed insignia and markings on its fuselage and wings. The airplane has a sleek, aerodynamic shape with sharply swept wings and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. Two large jet engines are mounted at the back, with visible exhaust nozzles. The wings are equipped with underwing pylons carrying external fuel tanks or ordnance. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed by a dark-tinted canopy. Distinctive markings, including a roundel and national insignia, are visible on the wings and fuselage, indicating its military affiliation.
description: A sleek, orange and black military jet with swept wings, twin rear engines, and detailed insignia. Features a forward cockpit and underwing pylons with external stores.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, swept wings, and underwing pylons.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the twin jet engines, vertical stabilizers, and tail markings.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the engine exhausts, wing-mounted stores, and tail structure.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the cockpit canopy, nose, and detailed wing insignia.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and underwing pylons; no visible winglets; slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear; main and nose gear units visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely multi-seat based on fuselage size.
